message:
fix(repair,dir): drop lossy UTF-8 rewrite & reject zero dot inodes

evidence: parse_evidence_ledger split on raw 0x0A and skip non-UTF-8 lines
individually instead of running String::from_utf8_lossy across the entire
ledger, which previously corrupted otherwise-valid neighboring lines into
unparseable JSON when one line had stray bytes.

dir: init_dir_block now rejects self_ino==0 and parent_ino==0 up front
without mutating the buffer, matching the rest of the validation contract
(invalid input must not touch the block). The proptest is constrained to
the new 1..=u32::MAX domain to keep fuzz coverage on the live path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
